text: Surrounded by glass walls and colorful, abstract designs, I feel both separated and invited—this is a space of research and discovery. The sight of the 'R+D' on the wall and the hum of distant screens evoke curiosity within me. The environment feels simultaneously clinical and imaginative, as if daring me to question the boundaries between human thought and machine innovation. It's invigorating to stand on this threshold between understanding and the unknown.
